svg.title: vibe-manager workflow with idea-first ordering
svg.desc: Complete vibe-manager pipeline. After opening message and Step 0 communication style, manager goes straight to Phase 1 idea capture which silently infers mode (Quick, Standard, Full). In Standard or Full mode, Phase 1.5 runs web research. Phase 2 covers product discovery with enhancement loop. Phase 2.5 is Stack Defaults pre-flight, positioned just before specialists need it. Then Phase 3a through 3e run sequentially: architect, designer, engineer, orchestrator, prompter. Phase 4 cross-prompt analysis, Phase 5 reconciliation, Phase 6 final output, closing message.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the vibe-manager trigger work?')
sendPrompt('What does the opening message contain?')
sendPrompt('What is the Step 0 communication style ask?')
sendPrompt('How does Phase 1 capture the idea and silently infer mode?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Phase 2 product discovery?')
sendPrompt('How does Phase 2.5 Stack Defaults pre-flight work?')
g.text: read existing block or set up inline

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Phase 4 cross-prompt analysis check?')
sendPrompt('What is in Phase 6 final output?')
sendPrompt('What does the closing message contain?')
